title: Play
subtitle: Fast text playtesting inside Studio
noRunDescription: Start a run to play the current session without leaving Studio.
noTranscript: No transcript yet. Start a run to begin.
promptInputPlaceholder: Type your next action and press Enter
choiceInputPlaceholder: Type a choice number and press Enter
invalidChoice: Invalid choice. Enter a number between 1 and {{count}}.
noChoiceOptions: No choices are available for this step yet.
generatingDescription: Please wait while the next part of the game is generated {{indicator}}
autoGeneratingDescription: Please wait while the game advances to the next part {{indicator}}
pausedDescription: This run is paused before the next boundary. Continue to keep playing.
endedDescription: This run has ended. Restart to play again.
errorDescription: This run hit an error. Review the message above or retry the failed step directly.
retryStepDescription: This re-executes only the failed step while keeping the current run progress. If that step already had player input, the same input is reused automatically.
runningDescription: The run is advancing. New output will appear here automatically.
